name: 品牌KV/主视觉

defaults.concept: product as hero with lifestyle integration

overrides.composition: hero product with premium lifestyle cues, magazine layout

overrides.concept: visual story showing brand promise fulfilled
overrides.composition: scene composition with product as emotional anchor

overrides.concept: product integrated into aspirational lifestyle moment
overrides.composition: lifestyle scene with product as hero element

overrides.concept: abstract or artistic visualization of brand concept

overrides.composition: generous whitespace, minimal elements, pure hero

category_tips.skincare: glow effect, premium packaging, transformation promise
category_tips.fashion: editorial styling, aspirational look, brand identity
category_tips.home-decor: lifestyle integration, aesthetic living, design statement
category_tips.furniture: comfort hero, premium material, lifestyle integration
category_tips.tech: innovation hero, futuristic aesthetic, premium design
category_tips.food: artisan quality, premium ingredients, taste experience

examples: Brand campaign key visual. {brand_product_hero} as the centerpiece, visualizing the concept of {big_idea_visualization}. The mood is {brand_emotional_tone}. Premium lifestyle cues surrounding the hero product. 8K editorial grade photography, magazine-cover worthy composition. Text overlay: 「{slogan}」 in elegant font. Color palette: {brand_colors_hex}. Aspect ratio 3:4 or 16:9 depending on placement

Campaign Big Idea visual. {brand_product_hero} integrated into {concept}. The visual tells the story of {brand_promise}. {brand_emotional_tone} mood with premium atmospheric lighting. Hero-centric composition with product as emotional anchor. Slogan 「{slogan}」 integrated into layout. 8K, brand campaign photography quality, consistent with brand guidelines

style_lock_fields.lighting: 符合品牌调性的专业光线
style_lock_fields.slogan: 传播主张文字位置和字体
